visualizations.title: Anatomy of Subtraction
visualizations.description: The parts of a subtraction equation: minuend, subtrahend, and difference.

steps.explanation: Minuend: The starting quantity from which you subtract.
Minus Sign: The symbol representing the operation of subtraction.
Subtrahend: The quantity being subtracted or taken away.
Difference: The final result showing what remains.

visualizations.title: Interactive Number Line Subtraction (7 - 3 = 4)
visualizations.description: Visualizing subtraction as moving steps to the left on a number line.
